title: Chapter 12 - Real-time Web Technologies
description: Quick checks on WebSockets, SSE, and webhooks.

questions.prompt: Which technology provides a persistent two-way (full duplex) connection between client and server?

byOptionId.d: Correct — WebSockets are full duplex persistent connections.

options.label: A server that polls other servers
A server-to-server HTTP callback that triggers when an event occurs
A browser API for drawing graphics

explanations.overview: Webhooks are HTTP callbacks sent from one server to another when events happen.

byOptionId.b: Correct — webhooks POST data to a URL you provide when events occur.

questions.prompt: Which real-time technology is typically one-way (server → client) push?

explanations.overview: SSE is a simple server→client push channel; WebSockets are bidirectional.

byOptionId.b: Correct — SSE pushes updates from server to client only.
